title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of encouraging people to read more, then decide which two would be most effective for today's society.
options: Making books more affordable or free
Promoting reading on social media platforms
Designing more welcoming public library spaces
Encouraging employers to support workplace reading initiatives

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to books, reading and literacy. Discuss the following ways of encouraging people to read more, then decide which two would be most effective for today's society. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would be most effective for today's society.
